lists.0: Vehicle not locked from the outside
Closed and locked and no valid open request
lists.10: Closed and locked and the user still pressed the Roofbutton in direction close or the user request to open the roof system and the StartConditions are valid
lists.20: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and TrunkLid is unlocked but not opened and the Roof is closed.
lists.30: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and TrunkLid is opened and the Parcelshelf is in coupe position and the Roof is closed.
lists.40: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and TrunkLid is opened and the Parcelshelf is not in coupe position and not in cabrio position and the Roof is closed
lists.50: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and the TrunkLid is opened and the Parcelshelf  reached the cabrio position and the Roof is closed
lists.60: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and the TrunkLid is opened and the Parcelshelf is in cabrio position  and Roof is not opened and not closed
lists.70: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and the TrunkLid is opened and the Parcelshelf is in cabrio position  and Roof is opened
lists.80: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and the TrunkLid not opened and not locked and the Parcelshelf is in cabrio position  and Roof is opened
lists.90: the RoofSytem is in intermediate position and the TrunkLid  locked and the Parcelshelf is in cabrio position  and Roof is opened and the user still presses the RoofButton in direction open or the user requests to close the RoofSystem and the StartConditions are valid
lists.254: Opened and locked and no valid open request
